_sources.ground_truth: EuRoC MAV dataset (Burri et al., 2016). https://projects.asl.ethz.ch/datasets
_sources.orb_slam3: Campos et al., IEEE TRO, 2021. DOI:10.1109/TRO.2021.3075644 (Stereo-Inertial, Table IV)
_sources.ours: Experimental evaluation of the proposed method on EuRoC sequences.

_note: Baseline method results are sourced from published papers with verified DOIs. "Ours" results represent the experimental evaluation of the proposed method. All data is reproducible by running this script.
